sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Itna tawh kei hong beel ahih man in
Amah in Ka min thei ahih man in
Munsangna ah Ka koih ding hi

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Aman Kei hong sap ciang Ka dawng ding a
Haksatna sungah nang kong ompih ding hi
Amah honkhia in Ka pahtawi ding a
Nuntak sau tawh nang Kong lumkimsak ding hi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nang tungah siatna na inn ah gimna
Hong tungsak ngei lo ding hi
Na mai ah tulkhat na kiim ah tulsawm
Hong puk hang in na lau kei ding hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Sun a thaltang leeng zan a lauhuai na
Hong su khasak lo ding hi
Topa' liim sungah na ling kei ding hi
Vantung mi te'n na hong cing ding hi
